title: Docker client wrapper → correct CLI flags constructed
evidence: All 6 TC-036 tests passed in 17ms. Full suite: 70/70 test files, 458/458 tests passed. - ✓ TC-036: dockerRun constructs resource limit flags correctly (--cpus, --memory, --memory-swap, --pids-limit, --ulimit nofile=1024:1024) - ✓ TC-036: dockerRun includes --name=claw-tenant-<id> format - ✓ TC-036: dockerRun includes -d flag for detached mode - ✓ TC-036: dockerRun appends :ro suffix on readOnlyBindMounts - ✓ TC-036: dockerStop passes --time=10 flag - ✓ TC-036: dockerRm passes -f flag
